## Procedures namespace

## Classes

<table><thead><tr><th>

Class


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[ProceduresLibrary](./ts-chocolate.procedures.procedureslibrary.md)


</td><td>

Multi-source procedure library with type-safe access

Wraps AggregatedResultMap to provide: - Composite ID access (e.g., "common.ganache-cold-method") - Multi-source management (built-in, user, app-local, etc.) - Mutable vs immutable collection distinction - Weakly-typed validating access for external data


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

<tr><td>

[IProcedureStep](./ts-chocolate.procedures.iprocedurestep.md)


</td><td>

A single step in a procedure (persisted data model). Does not include validation state - that is contextual and computed at runtime.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IProcedureStepValidation](./ts-chocolate.procedures.iprocedurestepvalidation.md)


</td><td>

Runtime validation state for a procedure step. This is computed at render/use time based on which TasksLibrary is available.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IValidatedProcedureStep](./ts-chocolate.procedures.ivalidatedprocedurestep.md)


</td><td>

A procedure step with runtime validation state attached. Used during rendering when validation has been performed.


</td></tr>
